name: claude-finance-kit
description: Vietnamese stock market analysis toolkit for Claude Code. Skills: stock-analysis, market-research, news-sentiment. Agents: marcus-vance (senior analyst), fundamental-analyst, technical-analyst, macro-researcher, lead-analyst. Data sources: VCI, KBS, MAS, VND, FMP, Perplexity. Covers: stock analysis, market research, technical analysis, fundamental analysis, macro research, news crawling, batch data collection.
